content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 2.1 Claims ↔ code — "offline" and "PDF export" claims both match implementation: LocalStore.swift uses only local JSON file storage with no networking (App/LocalStore.swift:1-16), and PDFExporter.swift implements PDF rendering via UIGraphicsPDFRenderer (App/PDFExporter.swift:1-17); no AI/ML/sync/ad-block claims are present in description.txt to check further.
